data.content: Implemented worktree recovery hint for knot not-found errors. Added format_error() in main.rs that appends 'hint: if running in a git worktree, try: kno -C <repo_root> ...' when AppError::NotFound is matched. Display impl unchanged. 3 tests added covering positive (hint present for NotFound), negative (hint absent for other errors), and ID preservation. make sanity passes (95.09% coverage). Branch: knots-76a8/worktree-hint
